title: Luncheon Meat 'S Delight
description: Don't know what to eat? Let's have lunch meat
body:
This is a subsidiary Mod of Farmer's Delight, adding Luncheon Meat to your game！

# Description
This Mod allows you to make, eat Luncheon Meat related food in the game

# Mod linkage
In tandem with Create, you can mass-produce Luncheon Meat

# Q&A
Q：In which game versions will this Mod continue to be updated?

A：1.20.1。

Q:Can I use this mod into my modpack?

A:sure, Make sure to credit, and don't claim Luncheon Meat'S Delight as your own creation。
